MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2005 Off Calendar

Motion To Enforce Compliance With Deposition Subpoena
Off Calendar Jan-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Bradley J. Jameson, appeared for Defendant/Moving party Hanson Property Mgt.
Philip S. Horne, appeared for Plaintiff/opposing party
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's Motion To Enforce Compliance With Deposition Subpoena is Granted. C.C.P. Section 1985.3 allows service of the notice of deposition on the consumer's attorney. That service was made.
The court also notes that the objections to the subpoena related to privileges that might apply to certain documents. Those objections must be made at the deposition, and counsel must state the basis of the objections and must identify the documents being withheld pursuant to privilege with specificity. Mr. Horne is ordered to appear for his deposition on a date to be agreed upon after meet and confer and no later than January 31, 2006.
All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS
Off Calendar Dec-28-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories and Requests For Admissions is GRANTED. Plaintiff's objections are overruled. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further within 10 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
